=== DYLN061700.txt

===================
Bob Dylan
George, Washington
June 17, 2000
Gorge Amphitheatre

Source: FOB Core HEB > M1
Lineage: M1 (spdif) > HD > CD > EAC > SHN

Received by taper as CDR and EAC'd in secure mode

Disk One
1.Somebody Touched Me (acoustic) 
2.Long Black Veil (acoustic) 
3.Desolation Row (acoustic) 
4.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) (with harp) 
5.Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) 
6.Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on Mandolin) (song by Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin and Jack Anglin) 
7.Country Pie 
8.Tough Mama 
9.Down In The Flood 

Disk Two
1.Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You 
2.Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
3.Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 
(encore) 

4.Ballad Of A Thin Man 
5.Like A Rolling Stone 
6.Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 
7.Not Fade Away 
8.Rainy Day Women #12 & #35 

Note: Shared bill with String Cheese Incident and Phil Lesh and Freinds.
